[44:34] For how shall I go up to my father, and the lad be not with me? lest peradventure I see the evil that shall come on my father. [45:1] Then Joseph could not refrain himself before all them that stood by him; and he cried, Cause every man to go out from me. ed: A person who is bound to serve another as a slave or servant.
cd: 被囚禁或奴役的人；僕人。
ex: bondman - 被囚禁或奴役的人；僕人。指一個被迫為他人服勞役或奴隸般服務的人。
